---
title: "KUB Datalab slides"
format: html
---

- [Intro](slides/intro.qmd) [pdf](downloads/intro.pdf)
- [normalfordelingen](slides/normalfordelingen.qmd) [pdf](downloads/normalfordelingen.pdf)
- [SEM](slides/SEM.qmd) [pdf](downloads/SEM.pdf)
- [Kategoriske data](slides/kategoriske.qmd) [pdf](downloads/kategoriske.pdf)
- [Lineær regression](slides/linreg.qmd) [pdf](downloads/linreg.pdf)
- [Logistisk regression](slides/logistisk.qmd) [pdf](downloads/logistisk.pdf)
- [Power beregninger](slides/power.qmd) [pdf](downloads/power.pdf)
